title: Melodic Sequence Generation: Deep LSTMs vs. Probabilistic Markov Chains in Generative Music AI
excerpt: A comparative study of deep recurrent sequence networks and probabilistic Markov models in music generation, analyzing training pipelines, mathematical foundations, and genre-specific performance.

title: Scaling Database Operations in WordPress: Optimizing Bulk Imports and Flat Query Caching
excerpt: An exploration of relational normalization bottlenecks under heavy indexing, custom denormalized database caching, and SQL relevance-weighted candidate scoring.

title: Architecting Concurrency-Safe WordPress Checkouts: Overcoming Event Espresso SPCO Race Conditions
excerpt: A deep dive into concurrency bottlenecks within the Event Espresso 4 Single-Page Checkout (SPCO) flow, implementing forced entity map cache invalidation, raw request self-healing, and direct database bypasses.

title: Configuring Headless WordPress via WP GraphQL
excerpt: A deep dive into setting up a secure, query-optimized headless WordPress database connected to a React Vite client using GraphQL resolvers.

title: REST and gRPC Design Patterns for High Throughput Apps
excerpt: An architectural review of API protocols, schema validation libraries, and rate-limiting structures to maintain 99.9% platform availability.
